This morning, I received the latest UI 8.0 update on my Galaxy A55. After installation, several issues appeared and this is only day one.
 
First, charging seems broken. My phone is in mint condition and less than a year old, yet the battery charged only 9% in over an hour right after the update. Normally, starting from around 50%, it reaches over 90% in lesser time.
 
Second, the sharing menu has become unnecessarily complicated. When taking a photo or sharing a file, I now have to go through two extra steps and scroll through a two-screen-long list of apps and Samsung services before I can share anything. One of the rows with suggested recipients of the file is filled of weird choices of contacts - long time passed aunt, the lawyer of home perpetrator from a court case 5 years ago, the delivery guy for my previous address, classmate from 15 years ago, etc.
